short_text: Shaheen Afridi to Hales, Bowled!! "Woaahhh," is the cry from Hales as he's bowled by a brilliant inswinger. "Yeah mate,"
full_text: Shaheen Afridi to Hales, Bowled!! "Woaahhh," is the cry from Hales as he's bowled by a brilliant inswinger. "Yeah mate," will be the answer to Hales from KL Rahul and Rohit Sharma. They know it all! Shaheen Afridi very smartly bowled this on a good length with Hales expecting a full delivery, the ball cut back in sharply off the seam to put the footwork out of the window. Hales couldn't get the bat down in line and time, he tried to get the legs away but that sharp movement and pace meant it burst through the gate, brushed the back leg and ignited the stumps. Pakistani fans find their voice.
